text: SSO with Azure AD is blocking our rollout. We have 2000+ employees and manual provisioning is unsustainable. This is a deal-breaker for procurement.
Please add SCIM provisioning. We manage identities in Okta and need automatic user sync. Manual invite/revoke is a security risk and wastes IT time.
The Gantt chart is brilliant but PDF export breaks everything — layout shifts, truncated labels, wrong page breaks. Clients get unusable deliverables.
Audit logs are non-negotiable for compliance. We need who did what, when, and from where. SOC2 and ISO 27001 require full traceability.
Subtasks need assignees and due dates. Right now we use comments to track who does what — it's chaotic on projects with 10+ people.
App freezes for 15+ seconds when opening projects with 500+ tasks. Unusable for our large product backlog. Happens every time.
Keyboard shortcuts would 10x our speed. N for new task, J/K to navigate like Vim. Power users need this.
Notifications are overwhelming. I get 50+ per day. Need per-project granularity: mute some, urgent-only for others.
Archive filter is buried. We have 80 projects and finding old ones takes forever. Need a dedicated archive view with search.
Okta and Azure AD SSO are both must-haves. We're multi-cloud. SAML 2.0 support would cover most enterprises.
Recurring tasks are essential: weekly standups, monthly reviews, sprint planning. Right now we duplicate manually every week.
Time tracking per task would solve invoicing. We bill clients by project phase. We use external tools and it's double entry.
GDPR requires data retention controls. We need policies: auto-delete after X months, export before deletion. Legal is asking.
Kanban swimlanes by assignee would clarify who's overloaded. We have 8 devs and bottlenecks are invisible today.
Mobile board: drag-and-drop doesn't work. Tapping moves nothing. We work on-site and mobile is primary. Critical bug.
Public roadmap would build trust. Customers want to see what's coming. Canny/Productboard style — upvote and comment.
Permissions are a mess. Need role templates: Viewer, Contributor, Project Admin. Current model is all-or-nothing.
Search by tag returns nothing sometimes. Same tag, different results. We use tags heavily for filtering. Unreliable.
Bulk edit is mandatory: reassign 50 tasks when someone leaves, shift dates for a sprint. One-by-one is torture.
Slack notifications and Jira sync would replace 3 tools. Status updates in Slack, tasks synced to Jira. Huge time saver.
SAML 2.0 SSO + enforced MFA for all users. No exceptions. This is a security requirement from our CISO.
Export should include custom fields and task comments. Current export is useless for client handoffs. We need full fidelity.
Portfolio dashboard: status across 20 projects at a glance. Red/amber/green. Today we open each project manually.
Pricing is steep for teams under 5. Usage-based or a lighter Free tier would help us grow into paid.
REST API for tasks and webhooks for updates. We automate with scripts. Zapier isn't enough — we need native API.
Task dependencies: blockers, predecessors. Gantt shows dates but not relationships. We can't model real project flow.
Login redirect loop — sometimes after auth we're sent back to sign-in. Can't reproduce every time but it's frustrating.
EU hosting and DPA documents for procurement. We can't use US-only. Data residency is contractual.
Client guest access: read-only on selected projects. They shouldn't see our internal tasks. Need granular sharing.
Calendar view: show milestones, drag to reschedule. Right now it's view-only. We plan in calendar, execute in board.
